basic_details.job_title: GVHSS Narla Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Govt. Vocational Higher Secondary School Narla (GVHSS Narla)
basic_details.short_information: Govt. Vocational Higher Secondary School Narla (GVHSS Narla) Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) Notification 2026 has been released on 05 June 2026 through Advertisement No. 001/Date: 05.06.2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GVHSS Narla Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Engineering / Technology in Computer Science or Information Technology / Master of Computer Science / Master of Computer Application / Master of Information and Technology / DOEACC B Level Certificate (higher qualifications such as ME/MTech acceptable)
qualification.details: Bachelor of Engineering / Technology in Computer Science or Information Technology Master of Computer Science Master of Computer Application Master of Information and Technology DOEACC B Level Certificate (higher qualifications such as ME/MTech acceptable)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 400/- per class subject to maximum of 40 classes per month
salary_details.details: Rs. 400/- per class subject to maximum of 40 classes per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GVHSS Narla Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GVHSS Narla Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GVHSS Narla Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) post at GVHSS Narla is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the school before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor of Engineering/Technology in Computer Science or IT, or a Master's degree in Computer Science, Computer Application, or Information Technology, or a DOEACC B Level Certificate. Higher qualifications like ME/MTech are also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) post is Rs. 400/- per class, with a maximum limit of 40 classes per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the GVHSS Narla Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) post primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: GVHSS Narla has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Guest Faculty (IT & ITES) post is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. Please check the provided links for the PDF and website.
